>更新时间：2026.06.25

# 微信支付 - 品牌入驻（普通服务商）文档索引

> 品牌入驻是商户开通微信支付品牌经营能力的前提，商户提交资质经审核通过后，即可获得品牌账号，开展品牌门店、营销活动及商家名片会员管理等相关工作。

## 接入指引
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016433410.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4017027854.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016985537.md)

## API 列表
- [提交入驻申请](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016249989.md)
- [根据业务申请编号查询申请状态](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016257694.md)
- [根据申请单ID查询申请状态](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016257685.md)
- [撤销申请](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016257700.md)
- [图片上传](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016276333.md)

## 请求示例
- [提交入驻申请 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016249989-curl.md)
- [提交入驻申请 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016249989-java.md)
- [提交入驻申请 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016249989-go.md)
- [撤销申请 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016257700-curl.md)
- [撤销申请 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016257700-java.md)
- [撤销申请 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016257700-go.md)
- [根据业务申请编号查询申请状态 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016257694-curl.md)
- [根据业务申请编号查询申请状态 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016257694-java.md)
- [根据业务申请编号查询申请状态 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016257694-go.md)
- [根据申请单ID查询申请状态 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016257685-curl.md)
- [根据申请单ID查询申请状态 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016257685-java.md)
- [根据申请单ID查询申请状态 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016257685-go.md)

## 附录
- [品牌能力介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016433389.md)
